en: When I'm away from you, I'm happier than ever

Give me a day or two to think of something clever
To write myself a letter to tell me what to do

I knew when I asked you to be cool about what I was telling you

And I'd end up more afraid

So if you really wanna know, when I'm away from you, I'm happier than ever
Wish I could explain it better, I wish it wasn't true

Cause I'd never treat me this shitty

And I don't talk shit about you on the internet
